fakoryzo-pilaf-argiro.name: Fakoryzo Pilaf
instructions: Wash the price first under running water.
Let it drag.
In a pot, add the olive oil and sauté the versions over medium heat for 10 minutes, until golden.
We take out half the onions and keep them for the end.
Drain the rice and add it to the onions, mix to oil.
Add the boiled lentils, water, salt and pepper and let it boil.
Simmer it half covered for 15 minutes for the price to burn. If the Lens dries, add some warm water.
Finally we throw the mint in. Add the food and let it stand for 10’.
Serve on the dishes by equalising the remaining versions in each port.

fast-and-spicy-chicken-noodle-soup.name: Fast And Spicy Chicken Noodle Soup
instructions: 1. Combine the cooked shredded chicken, cooked vermicelli noodles, and chicken broth in a pot.
2. Heat the mixture over medium heat until thoroughly hot.
3. Ladle the hot soup into serving bowls.
4. Top each serving with sliced jalapeño, fresh Thai basil leaves, bean sprouts, thinly sliced red onion, and lime wedges.
5. Serve with Sriracha and hoisin sauce on the side for seasoning to taste.

feijoada-saloia-with-poached-eggs-telecu.name: Feijoada Saloia With Poached Eggs
instructions: Drain and bake the beans on the eve, reserving the water. Lay on a pot the lard, the onion and the chopped garlic, the bacon cut into two pieces and the laurel leaf. Take it to the light, moderate, and let it blow with a spoon.

Add the white wine and tomato pulp and stir. Add the ribs cut into pieces as well as the sausage and the bat, cover and let cook for 2 minutes. Add 2 or 3 dl of the bean water and let it boil, in moderate heat. Take the sausages and bacon out as they get cooked.
Then add the beans drained and add the water to it, just enough to form sauce. Let cook for 8 to 10 minutes, stirring from time to time. Retrieve the salt and season with some pepper.
Finally, lay the eggs on the beans, cover the pot and let them cook until they are to your liking. Add again the sausages cut into slices and the bacon in slices and serve very hot.

fennel-salad-with-plums.name: Fennel Salad With Plums

ingredients.item: Champagne vinegar or white wine vinegar

instructions: Remove stalks and fronds from fennel bulbs. Cut fennel bulbs in half lengthwise and thinly slice on a mandoline; place in a large bowl. Remove fronds from stalks and set aside. Thinly slice stalks and add to bowl along with plums, vinegar, and 2 Tbsp. oil. Season with salt and pepper and toss well. Let salad sit 5 minutes.
Coarsely chop reserved fennel fronds; scatter over salad. Drizzle with more oil.

feta-stuffed-cocktail-buffalo-chicken-me.name: Feta-stuffed Cocktail Buffalo Chicken Meatballs
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Coat a large baking sheet with cooking spray.

Combine chicken, feta cheese, egg, bread crumbs, carrot, celery, garlic, and ranch dressing mix in a large bowl. Mix evenly until combined. Form mixture into 1/2-inch meatballs and place on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes; turn meatballs. Continue baking until no cooked through, about 14 minutes more.
Transfer cooked meatballs to a large bowl, add Buffalo wing sauce, and gently toss to combine.

filipino-chicken-sopas.name: Filipino Chicken Sopas

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine water and onion in a pot and bring to a boil. Add chicken, garlic powder, and onion powder. Bring back to a boil and reduce heat to medium-low. Simmer broth until chicken thighs are tender, about 30 minutes.
Remove chicken and add carrots to the broth. Stir in 2 tablespoons fish sauce, chicken bouillon, and black pepper.

Shred chicken meat and discard bones; return meat to the broth and simmer until carrots are tender, about 10 minutes. Add macaroni; cook until tender, about 20 minutes, adding more water if needed. Stir in evaporated milk and butter; simmer until butter is melted. Add more fish sauce and season with salt and pepper to taste. Pour soup into serving bowls.

fit-kandil-bagel-gluten-free-lezzet.name: Fit Kandil Bagel (gluten-free)

ingredients.item: 1 eggs (on the top of the white)
1/2 cup natural apple vinegar (use the same size by mixing refined vinegar and lemon juice)
4 tea cups of buckwheat flour, kinoa flour, oat flour, nohut flour, lentilme flour or mixture corn flour with these flour;

instructions: 1. Separate the egg white, take the yellow into a container, add liquid materials on the top.
2. Pour the dough by adding dry materials on the top of the liquid material.
3. You should definitely get a soft dough.
4. Remove parts from dough, give the shape of simit.
5. First immerse the egg white, then sesame or weed.
6. Cook in oven for 160 degrees.
7. It is important that it gives the flexibility of the preparation, and the consistency is important to shape because it is not in the gluten-free flour.
8. So I’m saying “soft dough” to show those who are not experienced in the unsaturated flour.
9. Attention!The amount varies depending on the type of one.
10. When using Karabuğday in the same amount, the size of 5 cups.
11. 11. Check out Kandil simidi  tarifine.

flourless-spiced-pumpkin-muffin-bites.name: Flourless Spiced Pumpkin Muffin Bites
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Generously coat 18 cups of a mini muffin tin with cooking spray.

Combine oats, pumpkin puree, yogurt, sugar, eggs, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and pumpkin pie spice in the bowl of a food processor; process until ingredients are combined and oats are coarsely ground. Scoop batter into each muffin cup using a 2-teaspoon scoop.
Bake in the preheated oven until tops spring back when lightly pressed, about 23 minutes. Cool in the tins for 5 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.

fluffy-macaroon-cake-argiro.name: Fluffy Macaroon Cake

ingredients.item: 1⁄2 cup (3 tabletspoons) of flower for all uses
1⁄2 cup (3 tabletspoons) of flower for all uses

instructions: For the fluffy almond cake, all materials must be at room temperature.
We swift the flower and baking powder.
Beat the butter and sugar in the mixer's bowl to become cream.
One – one add the yolks, zest and beat well to homogenize the mixture.
Add the almond, flour and juice.
Beat the whites separately with salt until they form soft trees.
A little – add the beaten egg white to the mixture, gently folding it.
We butter and flower very good ring form or 20 cm baking pan. Empty the mixture.
Bake in a well rehearsed evening at 170 C in the resistors, on the last grill for about 40-45′ until double in volume and golden.

fregola-with-green-peas-mint-and-ricotta.name: Fregola With Green Peas, Mint, And Ricotta

ingredients.item: Shelled fresh peas (from about 1 pound pods) or frozen peas

instructions: Cook fregola in a large pot of boiling salted water until very al dente, 6–8 minutes. Drain pasta (do not rinse), reserving 1 cup pasta cooking liquid.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium and cook bacon, stirring often, until bacon is brown around the edges, about 5 minutes. Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until bacon is crisp and onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.

Add wine, bring to a simmer, and cook until skillet is almost dry, about 5 minutes. Add broth and bring to a simmer. Add fregola and cook, stirring often, until pasta is just al dente and broth is thickened, about 5 minutes. Taste and season with salt and pepper. Add peas and chopped mint and cook, stirring, until peas are warmed through, about 2 minutes. Add pasta cooking liquid as needed to adjust consistency.
Serve topped with ricotta, mint, and cracked pepper and drizzled with oil.

fresh-and-healthy-mediterranean-tomato-o.name: Fresh And Healthy Mediterranean Tomato, Olive And Feta Cheese Salad
fresh-and-healthy-mediterranean-tomato-o.original_name: Ensalada mediterránea de tomate, aceitunas y queso feta fresca y saludable

ingredients.item: 100 g de queso feta (cortado en cubos)
A handful of black olives (with no bone)
2  cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra

instructions: He starts by washing tomatoes and cucumber and lettuce well. First of all, have all the ingredients clear and ready to use. Then cut tomatoes into middlecuts and feta cheese into cubes of the same size as tomato.
Peel the cucumber (if you prefer, you can leave his skin) and cut them into thin slices. The idea is that the cuts are thin enough to be fresh but not so high as to make them transparent.
In a big bowl, put lettuce leaves at the base. No need to cut them into small pieces, just add them so they cover the bottom of the plate well. On lettuce, place tomato and cucumbers.
Add the feta cheesebooks so that they are spread throughout the salad.
Esparce las aceitunas negras por encima.
To end, spray olive oil above and sprinkle dry oregano. Add salt and pepper to your taste, and if you feel adventurous, a little slice of lemon juice goes well with them as well.

fresh-potato-salad-lezzet.name: Fresh Potato Salad
instructions: 1. thoroughly wash the fresh potatoes and get to a deep saucepan and pour it into the cold water (fork enter the inside and stay comfortably until falling).
2. Then split potatoes into two, blend with olive oil and salt- pepper.
3. Furnace up to 200 degree oven with slightly fried.
4. Take the potatoes in a deep salad bowl.
5. Add and mix mustard yeastz on it.
6. For purple onion pickled and stir eggs.
7. blend and serve with fresh reyhan leaves, lentilizers and Brazed onion.

fresh-raspberry-sauce.name: Fresh Raspberry Sauce
instructions: Combine raspberries, sugar, water, and lemon juice in a saucepan over medium heat; cook and stir until raspberries break down, sugar dissolves, and sauce is heated through, 3 to 7 minutes.
Press sauce through a fine-mesh strainer to remove seeds. Cool to room temperature; cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate until chilled, at least 45 minutes.

fresh-strawberry-cake.name: Fresh Strawberry Cake

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: hulled, halved or quartered if large

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Grease springform pan generously with nonstick cooking oil spray.

Whisk together 2 cups (250 g) all-purpose flour, 2 tsp. baking powder, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium bowl; set aside. Whisk together ½ cup whole milk, at room temperature and ¼ cup sour cream, at room temperature in a small bowl until smooth; set aside.

Cream together ¾ cup (150 g) granulated sugar and ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter, at room temperature in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment at medium-high speed until light and fluffy, 5–7 minutes. Scrape down sides of bowl with a spatula. Reduce mixer speed to medium and add 2 large eggs, at room temperature one at a time, allowing each egg to fully incorporate and scraping down bowl after each addition, about 1 minute each. Mix in 2 tsp. vanilla extract and ½ tsp. almond extract.

Reduce mixer speed to low and add half of reserved flour mixture; mix until just combined. Scrape down sides of bowl, add reserved milk mixture, and mix until just combined. Scrape down sides of bowl and mixing paddle, then add remaining flour mixture. Mix until smooth.

Scrape batter into prepared pan, smoothing surface with spatula. Leaving ¼” cake border between first row and edge of pan, arrange 10 oz. fresh strawberries (preferably small ones), hulled, halved or quartered if large on top of cake, cut side down, in a circular pattern. Place pan on a baking sheet to catch any drips. Bake until a cake tester or toothpick inserted into center of cake comes out mostly clean with a few moist crumbs clinging to it, 50–60 minutes (top of cake will still be quite pale). Transfer pan to a wire rack to cool for about 10 minutes.

Meanwhile, microwave 2 Tbsp. strawberry jam in a small, microwave-safe bowl on high until softened, about 30 seconds. Stir jam, then use a pastry brush to brush jam on top of cake. Run a paring knife around edges of cake to loosen it, then release cake from pan and transfer to a wire rack to cool completely, about 1 hour 30 minutes. Serve topped with whipped cream, if using.


Editor’s note: Head this way for more of our best strawberry desserts →

fried-catfish.name: Fried Catfish

ingredients.item: . plus  0.75 tsp. diamond crystal or 2 tbsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Whisk 3 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 Tbsp. plus 1½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 3 Tbsp. hot pepper sauce, and 2 cups hot water in a large bowl until salt dissolves. Add 6 cups cold water and place 6 (5–7 oz.) U.S.-farmed catfish fillets in brine; cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour and up to 3.

Whisk 1½ cups cornmeal, 2 Tbsp. all-purpose flour, 2½ tsp. baking powder, 1 tsp. freshly ground black pepper, 1 tsp. garlic powder, ½ tsp. cayenne pepper, and remaining ¾ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium shallow dish. Attach deep-fry thermometer to the side of a 10” cast-iron skillet or other large heavy skillet. Add vegetable oil to come a little less than halfway up side of skillet. Heat oil over medium until thermometer reads 335°.

Rinse catfish, discarding brine, and pat dry. Dredge a piece of fish in seasoned cornmeal mixture, shaking off excess. Working with 2 fillets at a time, fry catfish in hot oil, turning halfway through, until cornmeal breading is golden brown and crispy, 10–12 minutes per batch. Transfer fish to paper towels to drain.


Editor’s note: This recipe for pan-fried catfish was first printed in our February 2012 issue. Head this way for more easy fish recipes →

fried-plantain-slices-step-by-step-comed.name: Fried Plantain Slices Step By Step
fried-plantain-slices-step-by-step-comed.original_name: Tajadas de plátano frito paso a paso
instructions: The first thing you have to do is peel the banana and cut them into cuts.

Banana cuts are cut into cuts or a cross or elongated shape with about 3mm thick. A simple way is to put the banana on a board to mince and you get diagonal cuts so that they have some long and beautiful cuts.

In a satin with medium-high heat, put up to heat the oil. Once hot, place the cuts to fry them. They cook very quickly, you have to cook for 1 minute or less at each end. I recommend that you don't get out of the frying pan so they don't get burned.
Wait a few seconds and once you see that she's put herself in a golden tone from the bottom, it's time to turn with the help of a fork.
When they're already golden on both sides, put them out and put them on absorbing paper, then add more cuts to fry till you have been with them all.
Once fried, banana cuts are ready to serve.
Enjoy them!

frozen-caramel-coffee.name: Frozen Caramel Coffee
instructions: Place cold brew concentrate, milk, 2 tablespoons caramel ice cream syrup, and sugar in blender; blend until mixed, 5 to 10 seconds. Add ice cubes and blend well, about 5 seconds. Pour into a glass.
Serve topped with whipped topping and a drizzle of caramel syrup.

frozen-chocolate-peppermint-buche-de-noe.name: Frozen Chocolate-peppermint Bûche De Noël

ingredients.item: Fresh camellia leaves or lemon leaves
Coarsely crushed red-and-white-striped hard peppermint candies or candy canes

instructions: Place chocolate in medium microwave-safe bowl. Bring cream to simmer in small saucepan. Pour cream over chocolate. Let stand 1 minute, then whisk until melted and smooth. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 week ahead. Cool, cover, and chill. Rewarm, uncovered, in microwave in 15-second intervals and whisk before using.

Stir chocolate in small saucepan over low heat until melted and smooth. Remove from heat. Using pastry brush, brush chocolate on underside (veined side) of 1 leaf to coat completely (do not allow chocolate to drip over edge of leaf). Place leaf, chocolate side up, on small foil-lined baking sheet. Repeat with remaining leaves. Chill, uncovered, until chocolate coating is cold and firm, at least 1 hour. Working with 1 leaf at a time, carefully peel green leaf away from chocolate. Return chocolate leaf to same sheet; discard green leaf. DO AHEAD Can be made 3 days ahead. Cover with plastic wrap and chill.
Position rack in center of oven and preheat to 191°C. Line 15x10x1-inch baking sheet with parchment. Coat paper with nonstick spray and dust with cocoa.

Sift 1/2 cup sugar, cake flour, 1/4 cup cocoa, baking powder, and salt into small bowl. Using electric mixer, beat egg yolks in large bowl until thick. Beat in oil, 2 tablespoons water, and vanilla. Gradually add dry ingredients, beating just until blended. Using clean dry beaters, beat egg whites and cream of tartar in medium bowl until soft peaks form. Gradually add remaining 1/2 cup sugar, beating until stiff but not dry. Fold 1/4 of whites into yolk mixture to lighten. Fold in remaining whites in 2 additions. Spread batter evenly on prepared baking sheet.

Bake cake until puffed and tester inserted into center comes out clean, about 12 minutes. Cool cake in pan on rack 10 minutes. Sift light layer of cocoa over large smooth kitchen towel (not terry cloth). Cut around pan sides. Turn cake out onto prepared towel, leaving 3-inch cloth border on 1 long side. Peel off parchment. Starting at long side with cloth border and using cloth as aid, roll up cake in towel (towel will be rolled up inside). Place cake, seam side down, on work surface; cool completely.

Microwave ice cream in 10-second intervals until barely softened. Unroll cake on work surface but leave on cloth. Dollop ice cream over cake by spoonfuls. Gently spread ice cream into even layer, leaving 1-inch plain border on long side opposite cloth border. Sprinkle ice cream with crushed candy. Using cloth as aid and starting at cloth border, roll up cake, enclosing ice cream in cake. Place cake, seam side down, on long platter; cover with plastic wrap. Freeze cake at least 8 hours or overnight.
Using electric mixer, beat egg whites and cream of tartar in large bowl to soft peaks. Gradually add sugar, beating until stiff but not dry. Beat in vanilla.

Cut off 1/8 of cake at angle at 1 end. Press cutoff part onto center of 1 side of log, cut side in. Spread meringue all over top, sides, and ends of cake. Using fork, make long grooves in meringue down length of cake and in circles on ends to resemble tree bark. Freeze cake until meringue is cold and firm, at least 3 hours. Using torch, brown meringue in random spots. Return cake to freezer. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and keep frozen.
Garnish cake with chocolate leaves, fresh mint sprigs, and small candy canes. Cut cake crosswise into 1-inch-wide slices. Drizzle with warm chocolate sauce.

frozen-pomegranate-and-cashew-cake.name: Frozen Pomegranate And Cashew Cake

ingredients.item: Zest and juice of 1 large lemon

instructions: Grind almonds, sunflower seeds, and hemp seeds in a blender or food processor for 1 minute. Add dates, oil, and salt and purée until mixture comes together. Place in springform pan and press evenly across bottom of pan. Chill.

Heat oil and agave in a small saucepan over low heat, whisking, until liquid. Place mixture in a blender or food processor; add soaked cashews, lemon juice and zest, orange juice and zest, cinnamon, cloves, and cardamom. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean; discard bean. Purée until very smooth, 2–3 minutes. Pour filling over crust and chill in freezer until set, about 30 minutes.

Place pomegranate seeds and lime juice in blender or food processor and blend until smooth. Pour topping over cashew filling. Chill in freezer until solid, 30–60 minutes. Let stand at room temperature 10–15 minutes before serving. Run a sharp knife under hot water to make it easier to cut the slices.
Do Ahead: Cake can be made 2 days ahead. Remove from freezer and let stand about 20 minutes before serving.

full-of-veggies-burritos.name: Full-of-veggies Burritos

ingredients.prep: such as Chimayo Chorizo Sausage Spice by Savory Spice Shop®

instructions: Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat until sizzling. Add mushrooms and onion and cook until mushrooms begin to soften, about 5 minutes. Add beans, diced tomatoes, and 2 tablespoons reserved tomato juice. Season with chorizo sausage seasoning and cook, stirring constantly, about 4 minutes. Add spinach and cook until wilted, about 5 minutes.

Add a few tablespoons of the vegetable mixture to the middle of a warmed tortilla. Fold in the outer edges, beginning at the middle edge of tortilla, and fold inward towards the filling; continue rolling until filling is enclosed. Repeat with remaining tortillas and filling.
